case_title: CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. ALEXANDRA JONDRO

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-08-2025 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-09-2025 CONTINUED TO MAR-10-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CROWN ASSET MANAGEMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONDRO, ALEXANDRA $4,008.56 PRINCIPAL, $379.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,387.81, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
